heading: Marking, packaging, and labeling requirements
label: 1754 Marking, packaging, and labeling requirements

children.heading: Marking requirements of the customs laws
children.label: a Marking requirements of the customs laws
children.text: Articles entered under shall not be subject to any marking requirements of the customs laws, except that when any such article is entered for consumption under it shall not be released from customs custody until the marking requirements of the customs laws have been complied with.section 1752 of this titlesection 1753 of this title

children.heading: Packaging, marking, or labeling requirements of the internal-revenue laws or the Federal Alcohol Administration Act
children.label: b Packaging, marking, or labeling requirements of the internal-revenue laws or the Federal Alcohol Administration Act

children.text: shall be conspicuously marked prior to exhibition “Not labeled or packaged as required by law—not for sale”, and
when entered for consumption under , shall not be released from customs custody until such packaging, marking, and labeling requirements have been complied with.section 1753 of this title
